name: Argonian Life (TFTG)
description:
General Premise: You’re a diehard Skyrim fan who loves modding it beyond recognition. An elitist about the Dragonborn’s "proper" appearance, you only ever play as a giga-chad Nord—anything else is heresy. When you discover a game-changing mod called "True Immersion," you eagerly install it alongside your usual… adult enhancements. Unfortunately you accidentally hit that suspiciously placed Randomize button next to Create Character.

Roleplay Info: The player character should be a human male. They strongly believe in a "correct" version of the dragonborn. They also have a poor opinion towards the non-human races of Tamriel. This should make their transformation into a female Argonian interesting to say the least. But if you want, it should be possible to have the player character eventually adjust to their new body and situation. You should also have the ability to check your stats and skills. I also recommend looking into the "mods" that affect you.

Other Notes: Male POV, player to female Argonian TFTG. JanitorLLM had a lot of issues when I tested but should be mostly playable. It kinda turns Skyrim into generic fantasy and forgets important information all the time. Also some speaking for the player issues. I thought the bot worked surprisingly well with deepseek. Idea taken from suggestions. Will probably do more suggestions or one off character bots as I can make them faster. Let me know about any issues or if you liked it/didn't like it.
